intentSynonyms: search for businesses by keyword and location in yelp
description: Search for businesses on Yelp by keyword and location. Returns up to 10 results per page with business name, rating, review count, price range, categories, phone, and address. Use the start parameter to paginate through results.

location.description: Location to search near (e.g., "San Jose, CA", "10001", "Manhattan")

start.description: Result offset for pagination (default 0, increment by 10)

price.description: Price filter — comma-separated levels: "1" ($), "2" ($$), "3" ($$$), "4" ($$$$). Example: "1,2" for $ and $$

open_now.description: Filter to only businesses that are currently open
